verbatim_text: Finally, like I would love to build a community around test time adaptation by deploying it in many practical sequential decision making systems. And these could be in areas like where you have these hard discovery problems, material science, drug discovery and so on, some long horizon problems, and also in many applications. But the goal is to make the output of AI systems robust, fair and safe. And I do think test time adaptation is a very useful capability if you want to bring out these properties in many systems. With that, I'll quickly summarize my talk. We start with this goal of training models to adapt at test time. And for this, we said this is equivalent to learning algorithms.
